line_override_win_count: Rule: {rule_text} How many mini-boards are wins for {target_player}?
Using this rule: {rule_text} Count the mini-boards where {target_player} wins.
How many boards does {target_player} win? Rule: {rule_text}
For player {target_player}, count wins using the stated rule: {rule_text}
How many labeled boards are wins for {target_player}? Rule: {rule_text}
line_override_loss_count: Rule: {rule_text} How many mini-boards are losses for {target_player}?
Using this rule: {rule_text} Count the mini-boards where {target_player} loses.
How many boards does {target_player} lose? Rule: {rule_text}
For player {target_player}, count losses using the stated rule: {rule_text}
How many labeled boards are losses for {target_player}? Rule: {rule_text}
piece_override_win_count: Rule: {rule_text} How many mini-boards are wins for {target_player}?
Using this rule: {rule_text} Count the mini-boards where {target_player} wins.
How many boards does {target_player} win? Rule: {rule_text}
For player {target_player}, count wins using the stated rule: {rule_text}
How many labeled boards are wins for {target_player}? Rule: {rule_text}
piece_override_loss_count: Rule: {rule_text} How many mini-boards are losses for {target_player}?
Using this rule: {rule_text} Count the mini-boards where {target_player} loses.
How many boards does {target_player} lose? Rule: {rule_text}
For player {target_player}, count losses using the stated rule: {rule_text}
How many labeled boards are losses for {target_player}? Rule: {rule_text}

code_prompt_defaults.line_rule_text: For the target player, making a full row, column, or diagonal loses; otherwise that player wins.
code_prompt_defaults.piece_rule_text: For the target player, having fewer pieces than the other player wins; having more pieces loses.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_line_override_win_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1] around every counted mini-board where the target player wins under the stated rule; use [] if none
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_line_override_win_count: set "answer" to the integer number of target-player wins
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_line_override_loss_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1] around every counted mini-board where the target player loses under the stated rule; use [] if none
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_line_override_loss_count: set "answer" to the integer number of target-player losses
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_piece_override_win_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1] around every counted mini-board where the target player wins under the stated rule; use [] if none
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_piece_override_win_count: set "answer" to the integer number of target-player wins
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_piece_override_loss_coun: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1] around every counted mini-board where the target player loses under the stated rule; use [] if none
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_piece_override_loss_count: set "answer" to the integer number of target-player losses
